10th anniversary – Natsucomi variant

Published by:
    Shueisha
Country:(Japan)
Manga:
  • One Piece
Where:
  • Comiket
Release:
  • 2007
Tags:
  • BFAM
  • Full art
  • Purchase Bonus
  • PVC

PVC cover obtainable during the Summer Comiket, also known as Natsucomi (夏コミ). Released in the 2007 for the 10th anniversary of the series.

 

If you don’t understand why your french friends gasp when they see this cover, here’s the explanation.
